name: Cherry Custard Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sour cream or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Brush pie shell with egg white and sprinkle with breadcrumbs.
3. Scatter cherries on top of the pie shell.
4. Beat together cream, eggs, egg yolk, and sugar in a bowl until combined.
5. Pour the mixture over the cherries.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until the filling is browned and slightly puffy.
Serves 6
